faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Gramercy Park?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Gramercy Park typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in my Gramercy Park apartment?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within 2-3 weeks as we address all flea life stages. Multiple treatments may be necessary for severe infestations, and we include follow-up visits to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for pets and children in Gramercy Park homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, and our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used in your home.

faqs.question: Do you service both co-ops and townhouses in Gramercy Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We have extensive experience treating fleas in all types of Gramercy Park residences, from historic townhouses to pre-war co-ops and modern condos. We work with building management when necessary and understand the protocols required for different property types in this exclusive neighborhood.
